title: Fix circular class reference %p-printing causing infinite recursion

features.name: class with direct self-referential member
features.description: Code should include a class that contains a member which is the same class type as the class itself, creating a direct self-reference

features.name: class with indirect circular reference via intermediate class
features.description: Code should include classes where class A references class B and class B references class A, creating an indirect circular dependency

features.name: class %p format string printing
features.description: Code should include using %p format specifier to print a class object, which normally prints all members recursively
